creator: wenheping@gmail.com
text:
HI:

   Today I create this same ports ,then found I am too late.

   I think add below lines to the Makefile could resolve pav's problem:

   post-patch:
        cd ${WRKSRC} && \
                ${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's#-Wno-pointer-sign##g' Makefile

   Good Luck.


                                       wenheping@gmail.com
                                          20080708
